nodes.name: Onsager's Conjecture (Positive Direction)
nodes.statement: If $\alpha > 1/3$, every weak solution satisfying $|v(t,x+\Deltax)-v(t,x)| \leC|\Deltax|^\alpha$ conserves energy

nodes.name: Onsager's Conjecture (Negative Direction)
nodes.statement: For every $\alpha < 1/3$, there exist periodic weak solutions in $L^\infty_t C^\alpha_x$ that fail to conserve energy

nodes.name: Main Theorem
nodes.statement: For any $\alpha < 1/3$, there is a nonzero weak solution to incompressible Euler in $C^\alpha_{t,x}(R\times(R/Z)^3)$ with compact support in time. In particular, energy conservation fails.

nodes.name: Local Well-Posedness
nodes.statement: For smooth divergence-free initial data u₀, there exists a unique maximal interval J̃ and smooth solution u with $\nablau$ blowing up at boundary of J̃

nodes.name: Sharp Regularity Threshold
nodes.statement: For $0 < \delta < 1/4$, weak solutions exist in $C^\alpha_{t,x}$ with compact support whenever certain regularity conditions hold

nodes.name: Transport Equation Existence
nodes.statement: Existence and uniqueness for transport-like symmetric tensor equations with anti-divergence forcing

nodes.name: Euler-Reynolds Flow
nodes.statement:
$\partial_t$ v $+ 
abla_j(v^j v) + 
ablap = 
abla_j R^{jℓ}, 
abla_j v^j = 0$. The tensor R is the stress tensor.

nodes.name: Frequency-Energy Levels
nodes.statement: (v,p,R) have frequency-energy levels bounded by $(\Xi,e_v,e_R)$ to order L in $C^0$ if ‖$\nabla^k$ v‖ $\le \Xi^k e_v^{1/2}$ and ‖$\nabla^k$ R‖ $\le \Xi^k e_R$ for k $\le$ L

nodes.name: The Main Lemma
nodes.statement: Given Euler-Reynolds flow with frequency-energy levels $(\Xi,e_v,e_R)$, construct new flow with levels $(C\cdotN\cdot\Xi$, $log(\Xi$̂$)\cdote_R$, $log(\Xi$̂$)^{5/2}\cdote_v^{1/2}\cdote_R^{1/2}/N)$

nodes.name: Regularization Lemma
nodes.statement: Smooths Euler-Reynolds flow while preserving frequency-energy estimates, with ‖v-v₀‖ $\le$ C₀ $e_R^{1/2}$

nodes.name: Gluing Approximation
nodes.statement: Decomposes stress into time-localized pieces $R_I$ with disjoint temporal supports, enabling convex integration

nodes.name: Convex Integration Lemma
nodes.statement: Given Euler-Reynolds with localized stress pieces, constructs new flow with upgraded frequency-energy levels

nodes.name: Hölder Interpolation
nodes.statement: ‖f‖_{Ċ$^\alpha}$ ≲ ‖$\nablaf$‖$^\alpha_{C^0}$ ‖f‖$^{1-\alpha}_{C^0}$

nodes.name: Mollification Commutator
nodes.statement:

abla^k(\eta_\varepsilon*(fg) - (\eta_\varepsilon*f)(\eta_\varepsilon*g))$‖ ≲ $\varepsilon^{2-k}$ ‖$
ablaf$‖ ‖$
ablag$‖

nodes.name: Anti-Divergence Identity
nodes.statement: If $z_I, \rho_I$ solve the gluing transport equations, then $r_I = \rho_I + z_I$ is a symmetric anti-divergence for $y_I$

nodes.name: Gluing Proposition
nodes.statement: Local existence and estimates for glued velocity $y_I$ and anti-divergence tensors $\rho_I, z_I$

nodes.name: Littlewood-Paley Decomposition
nodes.statement: $P_{\leq}f = \chi_{\leq}*f, P_q$ f $= P_{\leq}f - P_{\leq-1}f$ frequency projections

nodes.name: Littlewood-Paley Hölder Characterization
nodes.statement: ‖f‖_{Ċ$^\alpha}$ ~ $sup_q 2^{\alphaq}$ ‖$P_q$ f‖$_{C^0}$

ablaf)$‖ ≲ $2^{-\alphaq}$ ‖$

nodes.name: Dimensionless Norm h(t)
nodes.statement: Weighted sum of $y_I, \rho_I, z_I$ derivatives measuring deviation from bootstrap estimates

nodes.name: Bootstrap Estimate
nodes.statement: $h(t) \le$ B₁(log $\Xi$̂$)^2 \Xi e_v^{1/2} |\int(1+h(\tau))^2 d\tau|$

nodes.name: Pressure Estimates
nodes.statement: Bounds on $\nabla^k$ p̄_I in terms of h(t) and frequency-energy parameters

nodes.name: Velocity Estimates
nodes.statement: Bounds on $y_I$ derivatives and material derivatives involving h(t)

nodes.name: Anti-Divergence Estimates
nodes.statement: Bounds on $z_I, \rho_I$ and their material derivatives

nodes.name: Combined Flow Estimates
nodes.statement: Estimates for full glued flow y $= \Sigma \eta_I y_I$ and Reynolds stress $R_I$

nodes.name: Final Flow Bounds
nodes.statement: ‖$\nabla^k$ ṽ‖ ≲ $\Xi^k e_v^{1/2}$, $sup_I$ ‖$\nabla^k R_I$‖ ≲ N̂^{(k-2)₊$} \Xi^k$ log $\Xi$̂ $e_R$

nodes.name: Back-to-Labels Map Estimates
nodes.statement: $\nabla\Gamma_I$ and its inverse satisfy uniform bounds under $\theta$‖$\nablav$‖ $\le 1$

nodes.name: Coarse-Scale Advective Derivative
nodes.statement: ‖$\nabla^k$ D̄_t $R_\varepsilon$‖ ≲ (log $\Xi$̂$)^3 N^{(k-1)₊/2} \Xi^{k+1} e_v^{1/2} e_R$

nodes.name: Amplitude Estimates
nodes.statement: Estimates for $\varepsilon_I, \gamma_J, v_J, \deltav_{J,\alpha\beta}$ and their advective derivatives

nodes.name: Correction Estimates
nodes.statement:

nodes.name: Transport and High-Frequency Stress
nodes.statement: Existence of $R_T, R_H$ solving div $R_T =$ transport term, div $R_H =$ high-freq term, with ‖$\cdot$‖ $\le (log \Xi$̂$)^{5/2} e_v^{1/2} e_R^{1/2}/(20N)$

nodes.name: Parametrix Integral Operator
nodes.statement: For u with bounded derivatives and $\omega$ with mean zero, construct Q solving div Q $= (1-\Pi$₀$)[u\cdot\omega(\lambda\Gamma_I)]$

nodes.name: Phase Function Estimates
nodes.statement:
For $\xi_m = m\cdot\Gamma_I$, bounds on $
abla^k

abla\xi_m|^{-1}$

nodes.name: Single Fourier Mode Antidivergence
nodes.statement: For each $m\ne0$, construct $Q_m$ solving div $Q_m = (1-\Pi$₀)[u $e^{2\pii m\cdot\lambda\Gamma_I}]$

nodes.name: Iteration Sequence Bounds
nodes.statement: The sequence $(\Xi_k, e_{v,k}, e_{R,k})$ determined by the iteration satisfies all required conditions

nodes.name: Transport Equation Well-Posedness
nodes.statement: For smooth u,g, solution f exists in $C^1(J\timesT^n) \cap C_t C^k_x$ for all k, with $L^\infty$ bound

proof_architecture.description: Convex integration scheme for incompressible Euler. Main iteration (lem:2.1) composed of three steps: regularization (lem:3.1), gluing (lem:3.2), and convex integration (lem:3.3). Gluing uses transport equations for anti-divergence tensors. Convex integration uses Mikado-type flows with high-frequency oscillations.
key_innovations: Gluing approximation to localize stress in time (lem:3.2)
Transport equations for anti-divergence tensors (prop:8.1, thm:4)
Frequency-energy level iteration with logarithmic factors

primary_ancestors.title: Dissipative Euler flows and Onsager's conjecture
Dissipative Euler flows with Onsager-critical spatial regularity

technical_tools.title: Hölder continuous Euler flows with compact support in time
h-Principles for the Incompressible Euler Equations
